test.name: marble_decision_rule_complexity_scaling
test.objective: Measure how Marble decision performance changes as rule complexity changes.
test.load_model: Closed loop: each VU sends a new request immediately after its previous request completes.
test.sustainability_definition: 0% errors, 0% timeouts, and 0 skipped decisions during measured run.
